summary: W896 keeps the target nonterminal under the immutable original four-task contract while replacing W895's bundled W725 closedness-branch input with explicit closed-map branch fields: selected-difference closed-map diagram components and the W519 mapped explicit cokernel closed-map provider. The assembled W725 closed-map branch feeds W895, then W894, W893, W892, W891, W890, W889, W888, W887, W886, W885, W884, W883, W882, W881, W880, and W879. Product success remains false because the explicit W896 fields, the remaining concrete leaves, the final original-four-task witness, and the completion review packet are still incomplete.
known_gaps: Task 4 is not contract-complete under the original four-task contract: W896 exposes the W725 closed-map branch as two explicit fields, but those fields and the other W896 concrete leaves are still not instantiated.
The W725 closed-embedding branch is not split by W896; this increment deliberately covers the closed-map route only.

The remaining W896 fields are WPP right-open boundary data, WPP source-pi-zero boundary data, relation-pullback data, target-relation-lift data, target-difference surjectivity, target-codomain compactness, selected-difference closed-map components, mapped explicit cokernel closed-map data, strict preimage object fields, strict preimage map fields, identity and composition coherence, source-image normalization, fixed-target uniqueness obligations, triangulated/source-side data, endpoint ExactAt facts, and bounded homotopy localized right-adjoint data.
The final Dbounded MetrizableLCA original four-task completion witness is still missing; ProductSuccessDeclarations and OriginalFourTaskCompletionDeclarations only record nonterminal route evidence.
The completion review packet still lacks the immutable-contract negative-fixture coverage, external SHA256 sidecar, and clean extraction audit required for product success.
remaining_work: Construct or precisely block concrete values for the thirty-eight W896 closed-map branch explicit field inputs.
Add the symmetric W725 closed-embedding branch split if the next route should preserve that alternative rather than continue down the closed-map path.
Continue splitting or discharging the remaining bundled providers only when the split is supported by current Lean definitions and provider-search evidence.
Connect the resulting route to a no-argument or fully instance-resolved original four-task completion witness only after all route inputs are real.
Refresh the completion review packet, negative fixtures, manifest, clean extraction audit, and terminal outcome only after the original witness exists.
